title: acleisanthes lanceolata
intro: Acleisanthes lanceolata, also known as the lance-leaf acleisanthes, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Nyssaceae. Traditionally, the plant's roots and stems have been used in herbal medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The medicinal properties of Acleisanthes lanceolata are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Acleisanthes lanceolata can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures.
